summary: Iteration 160 — Charged-to-Crop credit system fully tested. Backend: 25/27 tests pass (2 minor assertion-only failures: app returns 403 not 401 for unauthenticated). Frontend: All UI flows verified including Crop Credits page, Create modal, Detail panel, Payment modal, Extension, SMS Settings collection recipients, and public signature page.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 403 instead of 401 when accessed without token. This is consistent across the app and not a functional issue — auth is enforced correctly.

issues: Minor: Status counter grid shows 4 columns but on narrower screens might need responsive breakpoints — not critical, works fine at 1920px

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: POST /api/crop-credits auto-computes harvest date correctly (120 + 7 = 127 days from planting_date)
PASS: Duplicate season blocked with 409 conflict
PASS: check-block returns {blocked: true, reason: 'active_crop_credit', can_add_to_crop: true} for active season
PASS: Payment interest-first allocation working correctly
PASS: Extension requires both reason and PIN (400 if missing)
PASS: Extension with manager PIN 521325 returns 200 with new_end_date = current + 15 days
PASS: POST /api/signatures/session returns token, id, signing_url=/sign/{token}, status=pending
PASS: GET /api/signatures/view/{token} is public (no auth needed), returns credit_context
PASS: GET/PUT /api/settings/collection-recipients works correctly with org-isolation via db wrapper
INFO: db wrapper transparently injects organization_id — collection-recipients correctly multi-tenant isolated
INFO: _send_harvest_notification uses _raw_db with explicit org_id filter — correct pattern
INFO: qrcode.react v4.2.0 and signature_pad v5.1.3 are installed and working
seed_data_creation: Created 1 crop credit via POST /api/crop-credits for first available customer (Credit Customer 264ebc6f). Added stacked credit, recorded payment, added extension. Customer now has Extended status with ₱6,500 principal, 1 extension.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crop Credit system is fully implemented and working. Key data: 1 crop credit exists with status='extended', extension_count=1, principal=₱6,500, 1 payment of ₱1,000 recorded. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_crop_credits_160.py covers all API flows. All 16 features from review_request verified. Public /sign/test-token shows 'Not Found' gracefully. SMS Messages > Settings tab shows Collection Notification Recipients with 4 phone inputs (owner, manager, admin, auditor) — currently set to test numbers from test run.

tests_performed.test: POST /api/crop-credits creates credit with harvest date = planting + 127d
GET /api/crop-credits/check-block/{id} - with active credit returns blocked=True
GET /api/crop-credits/customer/{id} returns active credit with total_due and days_to_harvest
UI: Crop Credits page loads with 4 status counters
UI: Crop Credits in sidebar navigation with Sprout icon
UI: New Crop Credit button opens modal
UI: Modal has customer search, planting date, initial amount, interest rate, buttons
UI: Harvest date preview shows '120 days + 7 grace' correctly
UI: Customer search autocomplete shows results after 2+ chars
UI: Credit detail panel shows Principal/Interest/TotalDue/TotalPaid cards
UI: Season timeline with progress bar
UI: Record Payment modal with interest-first allocation preview
UI: SMS Messages > Settings tab shows Collection Notification Recipients
UI: 4 phone inputs (Owner/Manager/Admin/Auditor) in SMS Settings
UI: /sign/test-token public page handles invalid token gracefully
UI: /sign/test-token accessible without auth (no redirect to login)
